close_reason: Implemented error recovery E2E test (08-error-recovery.sh). Tests invalid deps, corrupted files, and BUCK file recovery.
description:
Test scenario: Things go wrong, user can recover

1. Introduce invalid dependency (non-existent package)
2. Verify clear error message during regeneration
3. Fix dependency, verify regeneration succeeds
4. Delete deps file manually, verify auto-regenerated
5. Corrupt deps file, verify detected and regenerated
6. Network failure during prefetch, verify graceful handling

Validates: error messages, recovery paths, robustness
title: E2E: Error recovery and diagnostics
